title: Project Life 2013, a Bit of a Slow Start
excerpt: As some of you may already know, I did Project Life for the first half of 2012. You can all those posts here . Because of my crazy travel schedule from July-December, I made the executive decision to not try…
body:
As some of you may already know, I did Project Life for the first half of 2012. You can all those posts here. Because of my crazy travel schedule from July-December, I made the executive decision to not try and force it while away from home. I was on 5 different continents in a span of 3 months, which sounds absurd when I say it or type it. It was an amazing experience and I feel truly blessed to have had such a wonderful opportunities. However, there is something so nice about returning to routine (if there is such a thing) and being home(ish) for a while. With that being said, when I look back on my Project Life album, I am delighted at all the little fun memories that were recorded. It is truly a treasure having all those little bits recorded in one place. So I am thrilled to be on the 2013 PL Creative Team and look forward to sharing my thoughts and pages this year. So far the cover page is complete.

Supplies: Snap! products || lifelovepaper ampersand || Pam Garrison stamps || Hey There stamp set || Thickers || washi tape || Surrounded paper || Lunch Break paper || Primetime paper || Elle's Studio tags || Staz On Jet Black ink || Project Life protectors
